title: fragariastrum petiolulatum
intro: Fragariastrum petiolulatum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragariastrum petiolulatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
